feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model
feed.subtitle: ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE
entry.content:
Hi All,

I tried looking on SCN and most of the threads mention table /IWBEP/I_SBD_SV and /IWBEP/I_SBO_ET but I could not find the details. I also tried serching in SEGW using patterns but no luck.

Could you please let me know how can we get SEGW project from V4 Odata service - API_WAREHOUSE_RESOURCE

Thanks !!

entry.title: RAP:FRAMEWORK
entry.content: IN RAP(SAP ABAP) IS there any possibility of develop a RAP API in SAP ABAP that handles both create or update the operation based on the incoming data. by user will just trigger create operation only?

entry.title: How can I use Launchpad Notifications with a RAP App?
entry.content:
Hello Community,

how can I use the Fiori Launchpad Notification with RAP Apps? Is that even planned? The concept behind it is not quite clear to me yet. At least I can't find anything about this in connection with RAP applications.

So far it looks as if the notifications are based on defined workflows. But does a workflow necessarily have to be defined in the SAP system for this? Or can I also use notifications without workflows?

A very simple example:
The user is to be informed that a date has been exceeded for a supplier. (The information for this comes from a simple Fiori element list report based on CDS views.)

Perhaps someone can tell me something about this?

regards

Lars

entry.title: I'm unable to retrieve the values for DFKKBPTAXNUM-TAXTYPE and DFKKBPTAXNUM-TAXNUMXL
entry.content:
I'm unable to retrieve the values for DFKKBPTAXNUM-TAXTYPE and DFKKBPTAXNUM-TAXNUMXL, it is returning all fields as blanck using the code:

ls_dynfields-fieldname = 'DFKKBPTAXNUM-TAXTYPE'.

APPEND ls_dynfields TO dynfields.

ls_dynfields-fieldname = 'DFKKBPTAXNUM-TAXNUMXL'.

APPEND ls_dynfields TO dynfields.

CALL FUNCTION 'DYNP_VALUES_READ'

EXPORTING

dyname = 'SAPLBUPA_BUTX_DIALOG'

dynumb = '0100'

translate_to_upper = 'X'

DETERMINE_LOOP_INDEX = 'X'

SEARCH_OWN_SUBSCREENS_FIRST = 'X'

SEARCHPATH_OF_SUBSCREEN_AREAS = 'X'

TABLES

dynpfields = dynfields

EXCEPTIONS

invalid_abapworkarea = 1

invalid_dynprofield = 2

invalid_dynproname = 3

invalid_dynpronummer = 4

invalid_request = 5

no_fielddescription = 6

invalid_parameter = 7

undefind_error = 8

double_conversion = 9

stepl_not_found = 10 others = 11.

entry.title: RAP attachments with Virtual elements
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Am trying to create attachments with virtual elements in RAP. There is no proper blog in detail to do the same. Any one has done similar requirement .Could you pleasehelp me

I have done and failed to open the attachment . Not sure where I am missing

This is my projection view

This is my output

This is my class code where am getting the adobe form from sap system

But after clicking the attachment nothing is happening

Can any one kindly help me where am I missing??

Thanks

Vykuntarao.

entry.title: Issue regarding multiple line items
entry.content: Hello dear experts. In my report there are multiple line items but when I pull data from the report through code only 1 item is showing multiple items. Please help I am stuck

entry.title: RAP show messages in popup
entry.content:
Hello,

I am trying to create a clean core RAP application, which is changing data from purchase orders. Since the business objects are not released for use in private cloud scenarios, but only for the public cloud, I am relying on the old Bapis. These Bapi calls are wrapped in a tier 2 software component and are called in testmode inside of the transactional phase and without testrun in the save phase.

Since we offer a function to change the data for multiple rows at the same time, the error messages which are shown in the default error message popup are not really helpful. This is because the error message popup has no connection between the error messages from the Bapi and which line of my list report is causing the problem.

Therefore I already created an own message database table, in which I am storing the return information of the Bapis together with the keys of my list report. My list report information is also already connected to the messages using associations in my CDS views. And using an additional CDS view I am already calculating the worst return message, which is available for my list report row. So I could already create a field, which is showing this as a processing icon:

The only thing what is missing is, that I want to click on the icon and want to display all the messages for the corresponding row. So basically showing all data using an assocation in a popup. Currently I have no idea how to do this only using metadata extensions. Does somebody have an idea how this is possible?

Greetings

Felix

entry.title: SAP RAP: Create Pop-Up precheck
entry.content:
Hello Community,

in my draft RAP application I have implemented a precheck for a field. As this is a key field, it must already be filled in the creation pop-up because of the draft function. However, the error message of the check only appears in the object page and not during the pop-up. 

I'm not sure if this is normal behavior or if I've done something wrong. The ideal case would be that the error message already appears in the pop-up and not in the object page.

Maybe someone can answer that.

regards,

Lars

entry.title: SAP RAP: Action with additional Pop-Up
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I have implemented a RAP App with a simple action. This action does not do much except set a status like the "acceptTravel" action (Link ) in the SAP Examples. This means that only one status is changed.

So is it possible that when you click on the action button, a pop-up appears with the message: “Do you really want to change the status?” or something else.

Unfortunately, I have not yet been able to find any examples in RAP of this. Actions are always executed immediately on clicking without the user being given a further opportunity to check whether they really want to do so.

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Create Standard Business Partner from Custom RAP Application for Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
I have Created a Custom RAP application in HANA Public Cloud.

I have a Custom table ZPATIENT_REG it has a field Patient_Id (Char 10), name and other Customer related informations. Image is attached for further clarification. Now I want to create a Standard BusinessPartner from Patient_Id. I can't create it with CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN because it is not whitelisted.

My Questions:

1. How can I create Business Partner from Patient_Id in my Custom RAP Behavior Implementation in S4HC Public.

2. If there is any other way to achieve this guide me on that.

Thanks & Regards

Rajib

entry.title: How to build wrapper RAP API to call 2 standard API's
entry.content:
I have a requirement to create equipment in SAP, where the data comes from a 3rd-party system external to SAP. After the equipment is created, we need to create a maintenance order.

To create equipment, the API - API_EQUIPMENT is available.
To create a maintenance order, the API - API_MAINTENANCEORDER_0002 is available.

In my scenario, I need to call the maintenance order API after the equipment is created using the Equipment API. Is it possible to call the maintenance order API upon the successful execution of the Equipment API using RAP?

entry.title: RAP Application Previewing Error in VSCode: Cannot find module 'keytar', Cannot find module 'vscode'
entry.content:
Hi,

We are facing the below error while previewing the RAP Application using VS Code.
Please help!

PS C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap> npm run start

 

> fi_rap@0.0.1 start

> fiori run --open "test/flpSandbox.html?sap-client=800&sap-ui-xx-viewCache=false#firap-tile"

 

info fiori-tools-proxy Using UI5 version 1.102.2 based on manifest.json

info fiori-tools-proxy Starting fiori-tools-proxy using following configuration:

info fiori-tools-proxy proxy: 'undefined'

info fiori-tools-proxy ignoreCertError: 'false'

info fiori-tools-proxy backend: [{"path":"/sap","url":"http://url.com:8000","client":"800"}]

info fiori-tools-proxy ui5: [{"path":"/resources","url":"https://ui5.sap.com","version":"1.102.2"},{"path":"/test-resources","url":"https://ui5.sap.com","version":"1.102.2"}]

info fiori-tools-proxy debug: 'false'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'keytar'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not "require('keytar')". Trying VSCode's copy

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'vscode'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not get hold of vscode

warn backend-proxy-middleware Dummy store. Trying to retrieve for service: fiori/v2/system, key: http://url:8000/800

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'keytar'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not "require('keytar')". Trying VSCode's copy

warn backend-proxy-middleware Cannot find module 'vscode'

warn backend-proxy-middleware Require stack:

warn backend-proxy-middleware - C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\node_modules\@sap\ux-ui5-tooling\dist\middlewares\fiori-tools-proxy.js

warn backend-proxy-middleware Could not get hold of vscode

warn backend-proxy-middleware Dummy store. Trying to retrieve for service: fiori/v2/system, key: http://url:8000/800

info backend-proxy-middleware Backend proxy created for http://url:8000 /sap

info fiori-tools-appreload Livereload middleware started for port 35729 and path C:\Users\SSharma\Fiori Projects\fi_rap\webapp

info fiori-tools-preview Initialized for app firap

 

⚠️  Process Failed With Error

 

Error Message:

 

 

For details, execute the same command again with an additional '--verbose' parameter

entry.title: SAP RAP - Create of grandchild is not working/reacting
entry.content:
Hi Community! 🙂

For a longer time we´re facing an issue with our RAP application. We are not able to do a create on a table, which is a grandchild of our root entity

Situation:

  • Root Entity (Location)
  • [0..1] Composition from Location -> Entity Topic (in this case Nature, we have 5 in total)

 

 

composition [0..1] of ZEHS_I_DemoTopic_Nature        as _TopicNatureDemo2

 

 

 

  • [0..*] Composition from Topic -> Entity with table entries

 

 

composition [0..*] of ZEHS_I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE as _InvSpNature

 

 

Location -> [0..1] Location -> [0..*] Table

Behavior Definition:

 

 

// Location
define behavior for I_Location alias Location
lock master
etag master LastChangedDateTime
with unmanaged save
{
  update;

  field ( readonly ) Country, LocationID, CountryText, LocationTypeText, RegionText, Region;

  association _TopicNatureDemo2 { create; }
  }

// Topic
        define behavior for I_DemoTopic_Nature alias DemoTopicNature
        lock dependent by _Location
        with unmanaged save
        {
          update;

          association _InvSpNature { create; }

//          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID;

          association _Location;
        }

// Table inside Topic (_InvSpNature)
        // Invasive Species
        define behavior for I_Demo_LOCENVINVSP_NATURE alias DemoInvSpNature
        persistent table ...
        lock dependent by _Location
        etag master LastChangeDateTime
        {
          update;
          delete;

          field ( readonly, numbering : managed ) LocationEnvDetInvSpeUUID;
          field ( readonly ) EHSLocationUUID, LocationEnvDetTopicUUID;

          association _TopicNature;
          association _Location;
        }

 

 

So far we see an ObjectPage with our Section Nature Topic. In this Section, there is also the table with our lineItems.

 

Problem:

We can navigate into the LineItems and delete them, but pressing on the create button is doing nothing. Can someone help us out? We´re struggling with that for a long time now..

Additional Information:
We also developed a Fiori App via BAS and added a custom Navigation to the manifest.json. Navigation and Delete/Update works, create button still doesnt react.

 

 

              "ObjectPage|DemoInvSpNature": {
                "component": {
                  "name": "sap.suite.ui.generic.template.ObjectPage"
                },
                "entitySet": "DemoInvSpNature",
                "navigationProperty": "to_TopicNatureDemo2/to_InvSpNature"
              }

entry.title: Creating Dependent RAP BO Entities via Root Entity Determination Logic
entry.content:
Hello, Experts!,

Could you please provide guidance on whether it is considered a best practice to create a dependent entity within a RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) Business Object by using the determination logic of the root entity?

Specifically, what are the best practices and considerations for implementing such an approach, and under what circumstances might this be recommended or discouraged? Kindly advice.

entry.title: How to trigger RAP Event in Unmanaged Scenario ?
entry.content:
Hello RAP Experts,

I need to add event on an unmanaged behaviour defintion. I have a button on list report and when the user clicks on the button , an event has to get triggered. In the case of managed behaviour defintion, there are few blogs which specify how this has to be done like using additional save in behaviour defintion and using save_modified  method in BP class and so on . 

But in an unmanaged scenario where exactly we have to write the RAISE ENTITY Event ? In the save method ? or one the action button method. Appreciate any help on this . 

@Andre_Fischer 

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model SAP BTP, ABAP environment

entry.title: Show PDF Adobe form in Object Page o from Action routine
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

In ABAP Restful, I created an action in the CDS, is it possible for the action to show a PDF - Adobe form file?

or

How to display a PDF - Adobe form in xstring format in an Object Page

Thanks,

entry.title: /LRN/S4D400_APT table doesn't exist in ABAP Cloud Course
entry.content:
I am busy doing the ABAP Cloud course, on the course you have to copy the /LRN/S4D400_APT table but it doesn't seem to exist. I tried searching for a package that starts with /LRN/ but is seem not to exist also on eclipse ADT. Below is the URL to the part of the course referencing the missing table.

https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills/exploring-the-architecture-of-rap_cdfbb8b8-9d94-4c33-bc5d-3d29d8206724

entry.title: SAP RAP Custom entity shows correct value in excel download but on screen value is incorrect
entry.content:
SAP RAP Custom entity shows correct value in excel download but on screen value is incorrect. In debug mode, the io_response->set_data( lt_final_response ). is having correct value but once the value shows on fiori screen it is duplicating the second row value in 1st row but when I download to excel, the values are coming correctly.Attaching the screenshot of debug model, fiori screen and excel value for reference.

  1.  Output in debug mode: io_response->set_data( lt_final_response ).

     

  2.  Output of Fiori app: 2nd row value is duplicated in row one

 

  1. But when I download in excel , it shows the output as Output of debug mode which I am also expecting on the Fiori app display but it is not showing correctly.

 

 

 

ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model

entry.title: How to use Data Store Object (DSO) in ABAP CDS?
entry.content: I need to join an ABAP CDS View with a Data Store Object (DSO). It seems that this is not possible in S/4HANA 2022 (Syntax error). Is there any alternative approach? E.g. external view, etc.?

entry.title: How to Upload a File in a RAP Freestyle V2 Application?
entry.content:
I'm working on reading data from an Excel file, but due to customer restrictions, I'm unable to use third-party libraries. My approach is to upload the Excel file to the backend, process the content there, and then send the data back to the frontend.

I am using UploadSet for the file upload, and while the upload process claims to be successful, the corresponding table in the backend is not being populated. I also tried using unmanaged save with RAP, but the code doesn't seem to be triggered when I attempt to upload the file.

Doe anyone know how to handle this scenario or what I am doing wrong?

Sample Codes:

UploadSet:

 

<upload:UploadSet
  id="idAttach"
  instantUpload="false"
  uploadEnabled="true"                         
  uploadUrl="/sap/opu/odata/sap/SERVICE/InvoiceAttachSet"
  mode="None">
</upload:UploadSet>

 

Upload JS:

 

onUploadBtn: function(){
  var oAttachmentUpl = that.getView().byId("idAttach"); 
  var aIncompleteItems = oAttachmentUpl.getIncompleteItems();
  var iIncompleteItems = aIncompleteItems.length;

  for(var i = 0; i < iIncompleteItems; i++){
    var sFileName =  aIncompleteItems[i].getProperty("fileName");
    var oXCSRFToken = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "X-CSRF-Token",
      text: that.getOwnerComponent().getModel("SERVICE").getSecurityToken()
    });
    var oSlug = new sap.ui.core.Item({
      key: "SLUG",
      text: sEingangnr + "/" + sFileName
    });
                
  oAttachmentUpl.addHeaderField(oXCSRFToken).addHeaderField(oSlug);
  oAttachmentUpl.uploadItem(aIncompleteItems[i]);
  oAttachmentUpl.removeAllHeaderFields();
  } 
}

 

RAP Behavior Definition:

 

managed implementation in class xxx unique;
strict ( 2) );

define behavior for xxx alias Excelupload
with unmanaged save
lock master

authorization master ( instance )
{
 create;
 update;
 field (readonly) Equnr;
}
